description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
⚡️ Improve
- refactor: update the new writing chunks logic for the Streaming body

🐞 Bugs
- Fixed: Send headers before writing chunk
- Fixed: Proxyman alters the header case
- Fixed: Crash When Closing Undefined HttpServer
- Fixed: Crash When Invoking EVENT_INVOKE_GET_IP_ADDRESS via IPC
- Fixed: Handle Undefined Response in License Activation Flow
- Fixed: Vrash when accessing undefined childNodes in SourceList
- Fixed: Fallback to PowerShell for Certificate Installation on Windows if sudo execFails
- Fixed: Proxyman fails to parse URL correctly when importing from Charles-generated cURL
